'''rahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yestersol|yestersol]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yestersol|yestersol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rahate|rahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rahatesher|rahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahatesherĂ«m|rahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rahatero|rahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rahateshĂ«|rahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahateshĂ«m|rahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirahatero|gokirahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirahateshĂ«|gokirahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahateshĂ«m|gokirahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorahankerom|gorahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorahankeshĂ«|gorahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahankeshĂ«m|gorahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorahankeya|gorahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rahaterom|rahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahatemu|rahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rahateya|rahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirahaterom|gokirahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahatemu|gokirahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirahateya|gokirahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rahahate|rahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rahahatesher|rahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahahatesherĂ«m|rahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rahahatero|rahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rahahateshĂ«|rahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahahateshĂ«m|rahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirahahatero|gokirahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirahahateshĂ«|gokirahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahahateshĂ«m|gokirahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorahahankerom|gorahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorahahankeshĂ«|gorahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahahankeshĂ«m|gorahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorahahankeya|gorahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rahahaterom|rahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahahatemu|rahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rahahateya|rahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirahahaterom|gokirahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahahatemu|gokirahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirahahateya|gokirahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠte|rĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠtesher|rĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠtero|rĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠtero|gokirĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠterom|rĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠtemu|rĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠteya|rĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠterom|gokirĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠhĂŠteya|gokirĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafhafte|rafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafhaftesher|rafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafhaftesherĂ«m|rafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafhaftero|rafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafhafteshĂ«|rafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafhafteshĂ«m|rafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafhaftero|gokirafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafhafteshĂ«|gokirafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafhafteshĂ«m|gokirafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafhafnkerom|gorafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafhafnkeshĂ«|gorafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafhafnkeshĂ«m|gorafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafhafnkeya|gorafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafhafterom|rafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafhaftemu|rafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafhafteya|rafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafhafterom|gokirafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafhaftemu|gokirafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafhafteya|gokirafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
